impact: This gives the next autonomous worker deterministic instructions for resuming progress: prefer one-file fixture-first work, inspect committed fixture shape before writing validators, avoid broad daemon rewrites after SyntaxError/TS parser failures, and return complete-file JSON replacements that can be applied without shell generation.
summary: Add a narrow supervisor repair guide for PP&D daemon recovery after repeated no-patch or syntax-related rounds.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 4 consecutive daemon rounds failed without an accepted patch

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
